role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil, and vegetation density consistent with the landscape role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Salix babylonica) and biome types (xeric scrub) relevant to the botanics role.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road markings, shoulder width, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like utility pole design and fencing styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Argentina. The agents provided grounded, image-specific evidence (especially regarding the utility poles and vegetation), and the tournament logic effectively used this evidence to distinguish between the top contenders.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and scrubland match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Willow and scrubland descriptions match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and shoulder descriptions match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Utility pole and gate descriptions match the image.
